title: solanum dulcamara var. cordatum
intro: Solanum dulcamara var. cordatum, also known as climbing nightshade or violet bindweed, is a perennial plant with a woody stem and purple flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to help with wound healing and reducing pain. The health benefits of Solanum dulcamara var. cordatum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of this plant include tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various health issues when used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
